name: Black Scryer Assasin

sheet.name: Black Scryer Assasin
sheet.background_story:
Following my master's commands, I pursued and eliminated the targets he designated

Now, seeking revenge, my master leads us to the Coven's Lair to thwart the ritual.

The Black Scryer's Assassin fled The Roost during their failed attempt on The Crow, but was chased through the halls of The Coven's Lair in a panic.

He dodged most of the traps, but you need to dodge them all to survive...
